SparkSQL.Name: Clean, Enrich & Health Rules
SparkSQL.SqlQuery: WITH typed AS (SELECT to_timestamp(reading_ts) AS reading_ts, energy_kwh, avg_voltage, avg_current, frequency_hz, trim(meter_id) AS meter_id FROM src WHERE energy_kwh BETWEEN 0 AND 50 AND avg_voltage BETWEEN 0 AND 400 AND avg_current BETWEEN 0 AND 200 AND frequency_hz BETWEEN 0 AND 70 AND meter_id IS NOT NULL), dedup AS (SELECT *, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY meter_id, reading_ts ORDER BY reading_ts) AS rn FROM typed WHERE reading_ts IS NOT NULL) SELECT reading_ts, energy_kwh, avg_voltage, avg_current, frequency_hz, meter_id, year(reading_ts) AS year, month(reading_ts) AS month, day(reading_ts) AS day, hour(reading_ts) AS hour, date_format(reading_ts, 'EEEE') AS day_of_week, dayofweek(reading_ts) IN (1,7) AS is_weekend, round(avg_voltage * avg_current / 1000, 4) AS power_kw, CASE WHEN avg_voltage > 240 THEN 'OVER_VOLTAGE' WHEN avg_voltage >= 220 THEN 'NORMAL' WHEN avg_voltage >= 200 THEN 'LOW' ELSE 'CRITICAL_LOW' END AS voltage_band, CASE WHEN avg_current > 9 THEN 'HIGH_LOAD' WHEN avg_current >= 3 THEN 'MEDIUM_LOAD' WHEN avg_current > 0 THEN 'LIGHT_LOAD' ELSE 'NO_LOAD' END AS current_band, CASE WHEN avg_voltage * avg_current / 1000 > 2.0 THEN 'HIGH' WHEN avg_voltage * avg_current / 1000 >= 0.5 THEN 'MEDIUM' WHEN avg_voltage * avg_current / 1000 > 0 THEN 'LOW' ELSE 'IDLE' END AS power_band, greatest(0.0, 100.0 - CASE WHEN avg_voltage > 240 THEN 30.0 WHEN avg_voltage < 200 THEN 25.0 WHEN avg_voltage < 220 THEN 10.0 ELSE 0.0 END - CASE WHEN avg_current > 9 THEN 20.0 ELSE 0.0 END - CASE WHEN frequency_hz < 49.5 OR frequency_hz > 50.5 THEN 15.0 ELSE 0.0 END - CASE WHEN energy_kwh <= 0.0005 AND avg_voltage > 100 THEN 20.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS health_score, CASE WHEN avg_voltage > 240 THEN 'CRITICAL' WHEN avg_voltage < 200 THEN 'WARNING' WHEN avg_current > 9 THEN 'HIGH_LOAD' WHEN energy_kwh <= 0.0005 AND avg_voltage > 100 THEN 'POSSIBLE_METER_ISSUE' ELSE 'HEALTHY' END AS health_status FROM dedup WHERE rn = 1
